mapper.sql: material_id, uploader_user_id, course_name, tags, description, file_id, file_type, file_size_bytes, material_status, download_cost_points, copyright_declared, download_count, review_remark, last_review_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_material_info ( uploader_user_id, course_name, tags, description, file_id, file_type, file_size_bytes, material_status, download_cost_points, copyright_declared, download_count, review_remark, last_review_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{uploaderUserId}, #{courseName}, #{tags}, #{description}, #{fileId}, #{fileType}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{materialStatus}, #{downloadCostPoints}, #{copyrightDeclared}, #{downloadCount}, #{reviewRemark}, #{lastReviewTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE study_material_info SET uploader_user_id = #{uploaderUserId}, course_name = #{courseName}, tags = #{tags}, description = #{description}, file_id = #{fileId}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size_bytes = #{fileSizeBytes}, material_status = #{materialStatus}, download_cost_points = #{downloadCostPoints}, copyright_declared = #{copyrightDeclared}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, last_review_time = #{lastReviewTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM study_material_info WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM study_material_info WHERE uploader_user_id = #{uploaderUserId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE study_material_info SET download_count = download_count + 1, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND deleted = 0 AND material_status = 'PUBLISHED'
